title: anisantha madritensis subsp. tefedetica
intro: Anisantha madritensis subsp. tefedetica, also known as the African wheat grass or African grass, is a subspecies of the Anisantha madritensis plant, a type of grass native to Africa and the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce stress and promote overall well-being. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Anisantha madritensis subsp. tefedetica can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is often used in traditional medicine in Africa and other regions where it is native.
